'''Jwlio''' was a [[food world]] of [[the Colony]] and home to the [[Taat]] nest. It was a moon of [[Qoribu]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King (abridged audiobook)|''Dark Nest I: The Joiner King'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{Mo}}
*[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen (abridged audiobook)|''Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
